title: A test probe
abstract: Disclosed is a test probe for testing electric characteristics of an object to be test. The test probe includes a barrel; a plunger including at least two divisional plungers which are in parallel and partially inserted facing with each other in the barrel and arranged to be movable independently of each other along a probe axial line; and an elastic body configured to provide elasticity so that the plunger can resiliently move along the probe axial line within the barrel. According to the present disclosure, the test probe is improved in contact and decreased in contact resistance, thereby enhancing test reliability.
claims: Claims ( 8 ) A test probe for testing electric characteristics of an object to be test, the test probe comprising: a barrel; a plunger comprising at least two divisional plungers which are in parallel and partially inserted facing with each other in the barrel and arranged to be movable independently of each other along a probe axial line; and an elastic body configured to provide elasticity so that the plunger can resiliently move along the probe axial line within the barrel. The test probe according to claim 1, wherein the at least two divisional plungers are equiangularly arranged with respect to the probe axial line. The test probe according to claim 1, wherein the at least two divisional plungers each comprise an inner end portion being in contact with the elastic body within the barrel, and a contact end portion protruding out of the barrel. The test probe according to claim 1, wherein the plunger comprises a first plunger partially inserted in one end of the barrel, and a second plunger partially inserted in the other end of the barrel. The test probe according to claim 1, wherein the at least two divisional plungers comprise uneven engaging portions which are engaged with each other in a direction transverse to the probe axial line so as to move along the probe axial line. The test probe according to claim 5, wherein the uneven engaging portion comprises a projection having a sloping surface inclined with respect to the probe axial line. The test probe according to claim 1, wherein the at least two divisional plungers have a same shape. The test probe according to claim 3, wherein the inner end portion comprises a concave groove recessed against the contact end portion.
